Transparent PNG

Start by loading input

Tool Options

Transparency Color and Area

Enter color to make transparent.

Match similar color tones.

Make the area transparent only around the outer edge.

Refine Edges

Make pixels on the edges of the matching pixels semi-transparent.

Edge smoothing radius.

Transparency Mask

Preview which pixels will get transparent.

Option code: threshold
